app.title: Menap - Imicungire y'Ibiribwa
app.subtitle: Gupanga no gukurikirana Integekanyo yo gufungura mu rugo

setup.title: Kaze neza kuri Menap
setup.desc: Panga kandi ukurikirane uko ufungura mu rugo rwawe, menya igihe ibiribwa biherera, kandi ubone integuza iyo ibiribwa biheze Igihe wabitegekanirije kitarahera.

search.placeholder: Rondera budget, ibiribwa, canke ivyo waguze...
search.empty: Nta kintu cabonetse kijanye n'ivyo uriko urarondera.

settings.title: Gutunganya ibirimwo
settings.export_desc: Bika ibiribwa, ivyo waguze, n'Intunganyo vyose muri dosiye ifunze (.dem).
settings.import_desc: Garura amakuru n'Intunganyo wari wabitse muri dosiye ya (.dem canke .sem).
settings.import_success: Amakuru yagarutse neza! Fyonda OK ubibone...
settings.import_error: Ntivyashobotse ko kugarura amakuru. Raba neza ko dosiye y'ukuri (.dem canke .sem).

dashboard.title: Kurabira hamwe
dashboard.no_budgets: Nta budget ifise itariki ihuye n'iyo wahisemwo. Fyonda hano uyuzuze!

budget.name: Izina rya budget
budget.delete_confirm: Ese urashaka gufuta iyi budget n'ibiyirimo vyose?
budget.no_items: Nta kiribwa kirashirwa muri iyi budget.

item.name: Izina ry'Ikiribwa
item.no_purchases: Nta kintu kirandikwa cyaguzwe kuri iki kiribwa.
item.advice_desc: Inama: Ikiribwa '{name}' Caheze hakiri kare ubuheruka. Turakugira inama yo gutegekanya {suggested} nukuvuga {original} wari wagize ubwambere guteranya {refills}.

contact.title: Hari ico umenyesha?
contact.author: Umutunganyi
contact.desc: Menap yagenewe gufasha ingo gupanga Budget z'ibiribwa, gukurikirana ibigurwa, no gukurikirana neza ibiribwa mu rugo.

logout.title: Gusohoka
logout.desc: Ese urashaka kubika amakuru yawe mbere yo gusohoka? Ugarutse uzoca winjira ukoresheje dosiye ya QR code canke dosiye ya .dem uzoba wabitse.
